Requirement_Description: PIPEDA consent screen must appear before any PII is collected
Only necessary PII fields collected during registration
Valid unexpired government ID must be accepted for KYC
Expired government ID must be rejected
Name mismatch between form and ID must be flagged
Duplicate account registration must be blocked
Users under 18 must be rejected at registration
Partial registration must be recoverable
Unsupported file formats must be rejected for ID upload
Valid e-transfer must be sent successfully
E-transfer must fail when balance is insufficient
E-transfer amount must be greater than zero
Daily transfer limit of $3000 must be enforced
Transfer to unregistered recipient must be rejected
Pending transfer must be cancellable before acceptance
Memo field must handle special characters safely
Duplicate transfers within 60 seconds must be flagged
Completed transactions must appear in history immediately
Transaction history must display correct fields
Transaction history must be sorted newest first
Transactions at or above $10000 must trigger FINTRAC flag
Unusual large transfers must trigger suspicious activity flag
5 or more transactions within 10 minutes must trigger velocity fraud flag
Session must expire after 10 minutes of inactivity
Re-authentication required before viewing sensitive account data
Account must lock after 5 failed login attempts
Concurrent sessions must not be permitted
API responses must not expose unnecessary PII
Password field must be masked during entry
App must not cache sensitive data after logout
Biometric authentication must work as login method
Structuring detection must flag cumulative transfers approaching or exceeding $10000 within 24 hours
PEP screening must trigger enhanced due diligence flag at onboarding
Sanctions screening must block registration and transactions for matched individuals
Dormant accounts inactive 90+ days must be flagged on transfers over $1000
Repeated round-number transfers must trigger suspicious pattern flag
Transfers to FATF high-risk jurisdictions must trigger additional scrutiny
Suspicious transaction report workflow must trigger on flagged transactions
AML alerts must require documented review reason before dismissal
